text: add intrinsicValue/cost to MCP aim tools — the MCP create_aim/update_aim tools don't currently expose those fields

reflections.context: Aim asked to add intrinsicValue/cost to the MCP create_aim/update_aim tools.
reflections.outcome: Found it already implemented — both fields are exposed in the tool input schemas and wired through the handlers (tools.ts). Marked done without code changes.
reflections.effectiveness: Verifying against actual code before implementing avoided redundant work.
reflections.lesson: Open status can be stale. Always grep the codebase to confirm an aim isn't already satisfied before starting.

status.comment: Already implemented: MCP create_aim/update_aim expose intrinsicValue and cost (tools.ts schemas ~132/159 and handlers ~633/669). Verified in code; no further work needed.
